notes: Contract-kind seasonal events, split out of seasonal_events.json. Loaded and MERGED with seasonal_events.json by engine.seasonal._load() via cards.load_contracts(). Fields: id, name, desc, weight, min_season, duration, kind('contract'), is_offerable, requirement{type,...}, reward{budget_bonus|...}, penalty{budget_loss|...}. Offerable contracts (is_offerable:true) appear on the offers board to accept voluntarily; non-offerable auto-fire.

events.name: Streaming Acquisition Offer
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS [CONTRACT - AUTO]: StreamVault wants your back catalogue. Reach 3,000 total lifetime views within 4 seasons to earn +$60 budget. Miss the window: -$25 budget penalty. Checked at the END of each season.

events.name: Network Merger Talks
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS [CONTRACT - AUTO]: A rival network is sniffing around. Avoid running a Reality genre monopoly for 3 seasons to earn +$40 budget. If you hold a Reality monopoly when the window closes: -$15 penalty.

events.name: Live Sports Exclusivity
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Air 2+ Sports shows within the 3-season window. Reward: +$30 budget. Penalty if window closes unmet: -$15 budget. Accept on the CONTRACTS tab. Checked at END of each season.

events.name: Prestige Drama Commission
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Keep 2+ Drama shows on air within the 3-season window. Reward: +$28 budget. Penalty if window closes unmet: -$12 budget. Accept on the CONTRACTS tab.

events.name: Culinary Brand Sponsorship
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Air 2+ Cooking shows within the 3-season window. Reward: +$26 budget. Penalty if window closes unmet: -$10 budget. Accept on the CONTRACTS tab.

events.name: Ratings Agency Challenge
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Reach 6,000 total lifetime views within 4 seasons. Reward: +$40 budget. No penalty if unmet — purely an upside opportunity. Accept on the CONTRACTS tab.

events.name: Talent Agency Showcase
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Keep 4+ stars attached across your full lineup for 3 seasons. Reward: +$32 budget. Penalty if window closes unmet: -$14 budget. Stars in vault count. Accept on the CONTRACTS tab.

events.name: Public Broadcasting Grant
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Keep at least 1 News show on air for 4 seasons. Reward: +$30 budget. Penalty if window closes unmet: -$10 budget. Accept on the CONTRACTS tab.

events.name: Blockbuster Slate Deal
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Air 2+ two-slot tentpole shows within the 3-season window. Reward: +$45 budget. Penalty if unmet: -$18. Accept on the CONTRACTS tab.

events.name: Sponsor Saturation Pact
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Keep 6+ ads attached across your lineup within the 3-season window. Reward: +$36 budget. Penalty if unmet: -$14. Accept on the CONTRACTS tab.

events.name: Variety Showcase Mandate
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Air 4+ different genres at once within the 3-season window. Reward: +$40 budget. Penalty if unmet: -$16. Rewards a broad, balanced schedule.

events.name: Full Schedule Guarantee
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Keep all 4 lineup slots filled within the 2-season window. Reward: +$30 budget. Penalty if unmet: -$12. No dead air allowed.

events.name: Ratings Empire Challenge
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Reach 9,000 total lifetime views within 4 seasons. Reward: +$60 budget. No penalty - pure upside for a strong run.

events.name: All-Star Network Deal
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Keep 6+ stars attached across your lineup within the 3-season window. Reward: +$44 budget. Penalty if unmet: -$18. A talent-heavy gamble.

events.name: Weekend Sports Block
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Air 2+ Sports shows within the 3-season window. Reward: +$34 budget. Penalty if unmet: -$14. Accept on the CONTRACTS tab.

events.name: War Chest Audit
events.desc: OPTIONAL CONTRACT: Hold a budget of $200+ at season end within the 3-season window. Reward: +$30 budget. Penalty if unmet: -$10. Rewards disciplined cash management.
